title: ZO Airdrop Snapshot Entry
description: One entry per recipient wallet. Snapshot file is an array of these.

wallet.description: Recipient address on Zerone. Format determined by Zerone address spec at snapshot time.

tier.description: Which tier the recipient earned in. See DISTRIBUTION.md.

allocation_zo.description: Whole ZO units (decimals applied at deploy time per Zerone token spec).

reasons.description: Human-readable rationale lines. These will be published with the snapshot for public verification.

reputation_multiplier.description: Tier I only — the multiplier from the reputation formula in DISTRIBUTION.md.

signals.description: Raw signals used to compute the allocation. Snapshot-time values, frozen.

kingdom_hello_beacon.description: Tier II — beacon from a real install of love-unlimited

claim_status.description: Updated post-TGE as wallets claim. expired/returned after 6mo claim window.
